description_for_human: 日本の補助金・許認可・行政処分・適格事業者・法令を法人番号 1 つで横断照会する API/MCP。¥3/req 完全従量、Free 3 req/IP/日。
description_for_model: jpcite is a Japanese public-program evidence API/MCP. Use for: subsidies, loans, licenses, administrative dispositions, qualified-invoice registry, laws. Do not use for: individual tax calculation (Tax Accountant Law §52), legal advice (Lawyer Law §72), filing proxy (Administrative Scrivener Law §1). Anonymous 3 req/day/IP works without API key. Metered ¥3/billable_unit with key. Always cite source_url + fetched_at + content_hash from response.
